title: Kevin Garland
compiled_truth: Kevin Garland is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-11-17), Kevin Garland sent 24 and received 117 emails, totalling 141 interactions. Top correspondents: [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (12), [Ken Rice](people/ken-rice) (10), [David Delainey](people/david-delainey) (6), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (6), [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (5).
